calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 33689.

Keith M. Velleca, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mazzy's Fire Protection Specialists, San Francisco, Inc.
Scott Mazzarella, Owner of Mazzy's Fire Protection Specialists, San Francisco, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Paul William Dawano or Dawson-Clinton General Contractors, Inc.
Default entered against defendants on May 21, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 22, 2008.
Defendant Timothy Baxter Clinton was dismissed on May 22, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mazy's Fire Protection Specialists, San Francisco, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Paul William Dawson and Dawson-Clinton General Contractors, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,440.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,573.97.
Attorney's Fees - $2,857.50.
Costs - $550.60, for a total of $11,422.07.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
